theme_and_archetype.rationale: A pure dark monochrome palette (blacks, zincs, pure white) maximizes data legibility and evokes a 'command center' software-grade feel (like Linear, Vercel, Raycast). It strips away the 'warm retail' feel, replacing it with cold, precise efficiency.

component_recipes.layout: Fully dark is the most '2026-premium'. Dark sidebar (bg-black) with main content (bg-zinc-950) creates subtle architectural depth without relying on shadows.
component_recipes.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 w-[250px] bg-black border-r border-zinc-900 flex flex-col py-6 px-4 gap-2. Links: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-900/50 transition-colors
component_recipes.kpi_card: flex flex-col gap-1 p-5 rounded-lg border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors. Label: text-xs font-medium text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider. Value: text-3xl font-mono text-zinc-100. Delta: text-xs font-mono text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-400/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded w-fit
component_recipes.data_table_row: group border-b border-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-900/30 transition-colors. Cells: px-4 py-3 text-sm text-zinc-300. First cell font-medium text-zinc-100.
component_recipes.form_input: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-zinc-800 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
component_recipes.primary_button: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-400 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2
component_recipes.ghost_button: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-zinc-100 text-zinc-400 h-9 px-4 py-2
component_recipes.empty_state: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center rounded-lg border border-dashed border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50. Icon: w-10 h-10 text-zinc-600 mb-4. Title: text-sm font-medium text-zinc-200. Desc: text-sm text-zinc-500 mt-1.
component_recipes.filter_pill: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-zinc-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-400 focus:ring-offset-2 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300
component_recipes.status_badge_success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500
component_recipes.status_badge_danger: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-transparent px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-red-500/10 text-red-500

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (e.g., bg-transparent to bg-zinc-900/50). Border color brightens (border-zinc-800 to border-zinc-600).
micro_interactions.focus: Sharp, high-contrast focus rings (focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-white focus-visible:ring-offset-1 focus-visible:ring-offset-black).
micro_interactions.transitions: Fast and snappy. Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out` universally.

specific_patterns.multi_market_scan: Use a CSS Grid (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4`). Initially render 6 `loading_skeleton` cards. As data streams in, flip cards using Framer Motion (`animate={{ rotateY: 360 }}`) to reveal country data. Highly technical, mechanical feel.
specific_patterns.verdict_go_nogo: Instead of full color blocks, use purely typographic verdicts with a 1px colored accent. 'GO': pure white text, font-mono, with a tiny 4px emerald-500 dot indicator. 'NO-GO': text-zinc-600, strikethrough or heavily muted, with a tiny red-500 dot indicator.
specific_patterns.sidebar_vs_main: Fully dark layout. Sidebar: `bg-black`. Main content: `bg-[#09090B]` (Zinc 950). The 1-2% lightness difference plus a 1px `border-zinc-900` separator creates perfect elite software depth.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update `/app/frontend/src/index.css` with the provided @import for Inter/JetBrains Mono and the root CSS variables (map them to Tailwind's dark mode or set as default).
2. Apply a global dark background: `bg-black text-zinc-100` to the root HTML/body.
3. Rewrite the Layout component to use the Sidebar and Main Content recipes.
4. Overhaul the KPI cards on the Dashboard Concepteur using the `kpi_card` recipe. Ensure numbers use JetBrains Mono via `font-mono`.
5. Re-style all Shadcn UI components (Buttons, Inputs, Cards, Tables) to match the stark monochrome aesthetic (pure white primary buttons, dark borders, purely transparent inputs).
6. Retain all existing `data-testid` attributes in all files you touch.
7. Remove all warm beige, orange, and terracotta references from the codebase.
8. For the 'Lancer un site' wizard, implement the multi-market scan skeleton loading pattern.
